name: BitLabs
description: Mobile-first survey offerwall SDK rewarding users with in-app currency in 73 countries, net 30 payouts.

seo.title: BitLabs — Ad Monetization / Mediation
seo.meta_description: BitLabs: Mobile-first survey offerwall SDK rewarding users with in-app currency in 73 countries, net 30 payouts.

when_to_use: Survey offerwall SDK rewarding users with in-app virtual currency
Monetizing non-paying users in mobile games via surveys in 73 countries
Net-30 survey payout offerwall for mobile apps with high DAU
Incremental revenue from casual game audiences via survey engagement

pros: Mobile-first survey experience vs desktop ports
cons: Survey fill rates vary wildly by demographic
Net 30 hurts cashflow vs instant offerwalls
review.verdict: Purpose-built mobile survey SDK that beats legacy panel tech, but payout timing is restrictive.
review.best_for: Reward apps and games wanting survey-driven monetization as a secondary revenue stream.
review.not_for: Apps needing real-time payouts or diverse non-survey offerwall inventory.
